name: WAYE.ai
description:
WAYE is not a single agent. It's the revenue and settlement layer for the agent economy. Most agent tokens rely on attention with no durable revenue. WAYE is the infrastructure: the rails agents use to get paid.

Token Utility: $WAYE is the settlement layer: Pay for agent jobs across the network Access priority execution and pricing tiers Capture value via treasury buybacks It's a utility and value-accrual token, not governance theater.
